name: everything-coding-agent
description: n-seiji's coding agent plugin: shared skills and workflows for Codex and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Shared coding-agent review and workflow skills
interface.longDescription: Provides shared coding-agent workflows for PR review, code review, TDD, and development automation. Codex loads the skills directory directly; Claude Code continues to use the existing plugin manifest and top-level commands.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use everything-coding-agent workflows for PR review, code review, and development automation.
